items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，但光看参数没用，能不能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Streaming Communication in Multi-Agent Reasoning
items.title_cn: 多Agent推理中的流媒体沟通
items.summary: Multi-agent reasoning systems adopt a "generate-then-transfer" paradigm that forces end-to-end latency to scale linearly with pipeline depth. We introduce StreamMA, a multi-agent reasoning system that streams each reasoning step to downstream agents as soon as it is generated, pipelining adjacent ag...
items.summary_cn: 多智能体推理系统采用“生成-转移”范式，迫使端到端延迟随管道深度线性扩展。我们引入了StreamMA ，这是一个多智能体推理系统，一旦生成每个推理步骤，就会将每个推理步骤流式传输到下游智能体，从而对相邻智能体进行流水线化...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Reinforcement Learning from Rich Feedback with Distributional DAgger
items.title_cn: 使用Distributional DAgger从丰富的反馈中强化学习
items.summary: Reasoning models have advanced rapidly, but the dominant reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) recipe remains surprisingly narrow: sample many responses and reward each with a single bit indicating whether the final answer is correct. Yet many settings provide rich feedback, includin...
items.summary_cn: 推理模型进展迅速，但占主导地位的可验证奖励强化学习（ RLVR ）方案仍然令人惊讶地狭窄：对许多回复进行抽样，并用一个位来奖励每个回复，以指示最终答案是否正确。然而，许多设置提供了丰富的反馈，包括...
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，价格先准备好——按token计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: Multi-Column RBF Neural Network Using Adaptive and Non-Adaptive Particle Swarm Optimization
items.title_cn: 使用自适应和非自适应粒子群优化的多列RBF神经网络
items.summary: The radial basis function neural network (RBFN) trained with a gradient descending algorithm provides an effective fully connected structure in both shallow and deep networks. The error correction (ErrCor), a state-of-the-art gradient-based training method, selects optimal hidden units to improve ac...
items.summary_cn: 使用梯度下降算法训练的径向基函数神经网络（ RBFN ）在浅层和深层网络中提供了有效的全连接结构。纠错（ ErrCor ）是一种最先进的基于梯度的训练方法，它选择最佳隐藏单元来提高...
items.comment: 跑分赢了，实际用起来如何？用户体感比数字更重要。

items.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Anthropic's Latest Model

items.summary_cn: Anthropic发布了具有改进的推理和编码功能的Claude 3.5 Sonnet。
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。
